name: Bizcochitos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the fat and sugar until quite creamy.
2. Add the egg and beat until very fluffy.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder and salt; add to the creamed mixture.
4. Stir in the sweet wine and anise seed.
5. Roll dough to 1/4 inch thick and cut into squares or fancy shapes.
6. Combine the topping ingredients and sprinkle on top of each cookie.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 15-20 minutes, or until light brown.
8. Freeze well.
